name: mdv
description: CLI Markdown viewer with Mermaid support and live reload

scripts.build: npm run build:js && CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project mdv.xcodeproj -scheme mdv -configuration Release build
scripts.install:local: npm run build && sudo rm -rf /Applications/mdv.app && sudo cp -R "$(xcodebuild -project mdv.xcodeproj -scheme mdv -configuration Release -showBuildSettings 2>/dev/null | grep 'BUILT_PRODUCTS_DIR' | head -1 | awk '{print $3}')/mdv.app" /Applications/ && sudo ln -sf /Applications/mdv.app/Contents/Resources/bin/mdv /usr/local/bin/mdv
scripts.test: vitest run && xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project mdv.xcodeproj -scheme mdvTests -configuration Debug test 2>&1 | tail -5
scripts.test:swift: xcodegen generate && xcodebuild -project mdv.xcodeproj -scheme mdvTests -configuration Debug test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:swift
scripts.lint:js: tsc --noEmit && biome check js/ tests/ && oxlint js/ tests/
